# Vendor profiles

Per-vendor reference. Stack-agnostic logical components map to specific vendors here.

- [[volante]] · [[form3]] · [[finastra]] · [[aci]] · [[fis]]

- [[fircosoft]] · [[bridger]] · [[worldcheck]] · [[complyadvantage]] · [[featurespace]] · [[hawk-ai]] · [[actimize]]

## Core banking / Ledger
